title: Keyword Plan
description: Structured keyword plan produced by /keyword-research. Contains prioritized keyword clusters, individual target keywords with metrics, and a content roadmap. Consumed by /seo-content for article production and by /start-here for content gap analysis.

brand_name.description: The brand or business this keyword plan belongs to.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this plan was created or last updated.

updated_by.description: The skill that last wrote this file, e.g. '/keyword-research'.

niche.description: The market niche or industry this plan targets, e.g. 'freelance consulting' or 'B2B SaaS email marketing'.

seed_keywords.description: The initial seed keywords used to generate the plan. These are the starting points from which clusters were expanded.

clusters.description: Keyword clusters grouped by topic or intent. Each cluster represents a content pillar or theme.

cluster_name.description: Human-readable name for this cluster, e.g. 'Cold Email Templates' or 'Freelance Pricing'.

priority.description: Strategic priority based on search volume, difficulty, and business relevance.

intent.description: Dominant search intent for keywords in this cluster.

pillar_topic.description: The recommended pillar article topic for this cluster, e.g. 'The Complete Guide to Cold Email for Freelancers'.

content_type.description: Recommended content format for this cluster, e.g. 'long-form guide', 'listicle', 'comparison post', 'how-to tutorial'.

estimated_total_volume.description: Combined monthly search volume across all keywords in this cluster.

keywords.description: Individual keywords within this cluster, ordered by opportunity score.

opportunity_score.description: Composite opportunity rating (0-10) factoring volume, difficulty, and intent alignment.

intent.description: Search intent for this specific keyword.

serp_features.description: SERP features present for this keyword, e.g. featured snippet, PAA, video carousel.

notes.description: Any additional context, e.g. 'Strong featured snippet opportunity' or 'Competitor X ranks #1'.
Strategic notes about this cluster, e.g. 'Low competition, high commercial intent -- prioritize for Q1'.

competitor_gaps.description: Keywords where competitors rank but the brand does not. Useful for content gap strategy.

keyword.description: The keyword the competitor ranks for.

competitor_position.description: The competitor's ranking position for this keyword.

opportunity.description: Why this gap matters and how to exploit it.

content_roadmap.description: Ordered list of recommended content pieces to produce, derived from cluster priorities.

cluster_ref.description: Name of the cluster this content belongs to.

estimated_word_count.description: Recommended word count based on SERP analysis.

status.description: Current status of this content piece.

positioning_ref.description: Path to the positioning file used to align keyword strategy, typically './brand/positioning.md'.

audience_ref.description: Path to the audience file used for intent analysis, typically './brand/audience.md'.
